# Feature: CLI --version from package.json

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-17 — do not edit manually unless correcting intent -->

## Intent
Dogfood: `autoguide --version` printed stale `0.1.0` while npm package was `0.1.6`. Print the real package version.

## Happy Path
- [ ] `getCliVersion()` reads `packages/cli/package.json`
- [ ] Commander `.version(...)` uses that value
- [ ] Unit test asserts version matches package.json and is not hardcoded `0.1.0`

## Regression
- [ ] Other CLI commands unchanged

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/cli/src/lib/cli-version.ts` + test
